posts.title: 10 simple ecommerce email ideas to improve ROI in 2023 (Part 2)
posts.author: Susmit
posts.summary: Five behavioral email marketing strategies for ecommerce, including post-purchase and abandoned cart messages, back-in-stock and price-drop notifications, pop-up forms for data collection, ecommerce-based workflow automation, and analyzing store reports to improve campaign performance.

posts.title: 10 simple ecommerce email ideas to improve ROI in 2023 (Part 1)
posts.author: Susmit
posts.summary: Foundational email marketing strategies for online retailers covering customer segmentation, personalization with merge tags and dynamic content, mobile-optimized template design, welcome sequences for new subscribers, and targeted campaigns with loyalty rewards and referral programs.

posts.title: Why hatching a successful Easter email marketing strategy is important for your brand
posts.author: Annet Mathews
posts.summary: Four key reasons to implement Easter email marketing: boosting engagement through themed templates and personalization, leveraging holiday promotions via coupon campaigns, building brand awareness with user-generated content, and capitalizing on personalization with dynamic content and AI-backed product recommendations.

posts.title: Why Zoho Campaigns is the best alternative to Mailchimp?
posts.author: vipasha.s
posts.summary: Comparison of Zoho Campaigns versus Mailchimp highlighting lower pricing (approximately $196 monthly savings for 10,000 contacts), unlimited email campaigns, free multi-channel customer support, integrated SMS gateway, robust CRM integrations, and dedicated onboarding assistance.

posts.title: Expert Diaries Season 4: Email marketing community is getting stronger
posts.summary: Industry insights and community perspectives on the growing email marketing ecosystem, featuring expert voices on trends and best practices.
